datum_strategy.scheme: fixture-oriented plate datum using the top face and front hole row
notes: Use hole centers and the connector-side slot as drawing QA references only.

tolerance_policy.general: Carry source critical dimensions forward; do not infer additional tolerances.
notes: Connector slot position and standoff height are critical manufacturing checks from the source config.

critical_features.description: Base plate envelope communicates the 145 mm by 98 mm by 4 mm machined carrier footprint.
critical_features.reason: Defines stock size and mounting-envelope context.

critical_features.description: Four mounting holes form the PCB screw pattern.
critical_features.reason: Hole diameter and pattern location control board assembly fit.

critical_features.description: Connector-side clearance slot must remain visible and tied to the slot-position quality check.
critical_features.reason: Prevents connector interference during controller subassembly build.

critical_features.description: Four board standoffs establish PCB support height.
critical_features.reason: Standoff height is a critical dimension for board coplanarity.

required_dimensions.label: Four mounting hole diameters
required_dimensions.reason: Confirms the PCB fastening hole size.

required_dimensions.label: Mounting hole column spacing
required_dimensions.reason: Captures the horizontal spacing from x=22 mm to x=123 mm.

required_dimensions.label: Mounting hole row spacing
required_dimensions.reason: Captures the vertical spacing from y=22 mm to y=76 mm.

required_dimensions.label: Connector slot length and width
required_dimensions.reason: Captures the connector-side clearance opening size; slot width is 10 mm.

required_dimensions.label: Connector slot position
required_dimensions.reason: Carries forward source quality critical dimension cd-02.

required_dimensions.label: PCB standoff height
required_dimensions.reason: Carries forward source quality critical dimension cd-01.

required_notes.text: Lot traceability label area on plate edge opposite connector slot.
